openers: It quietly studies the feelings of the people around it before taking action.
It stores ambient energy in subtle shifts of expression and posture.
It reads a room in an instant, then reshapes its aura to match the moment.
It channels its mood into a visible elemental presence that changes in battle.

gentle: When relaxed, it stays close to companions and mirrors their pace.
It prefers to guide others with soft signals rather than direct force.
It often watches quietly, then steps in with surprising care and timing.
Around trusted partners, it becomes far more expressive and playful.
mysterious: It appears and disappears from crowded places without anyone noticing how it moved.
Witnesses say its presence lingers even after it has already slipped away.
It keeps its intentions hidden until the exact instant it decides to act.
Its aura changes subtly in low light, making its movements hard to predict.

fast: bursts forward before opponents can settle into position.
turns small openings into a chain of rapid attacks.
moves with startling speed once its confidence rises.
leans on tempo and sharp reactions rather than brute force.
steady: fights with patient timing and carefully measured force.
prefers to control the pace before committing to a decisive strike.
holds the field calmly until a clear advantage appears.
builds pressure little by little, then finishes with clean precision.
